data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of issuing a certificate upon completion with 80% attendance. However, the evidence shows that while Sarah attended 4 out of 5 sessions, there is no explicit confirmation that a certificate was issued or that the attendance requirement was tracked in a manner that would support this. The evidence does not capture any details regarding the issuance of certificates or the specific attendance tracking mechanism, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of certificate issuance upon completion of the course.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify certificate issuance process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if a certificate is issued for attendees who meet the 80% attendance requirement.
